'''fathoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headcloth|headcloth]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headcloth|headcloth]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fathoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fætheseth|fætheseth]] || [[word:fæthesej|fæthesej]] || [[word:fæthesesh|fæthesesh]] || [[word:fæthese|fæthese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fathothosoth|fathothosoth]] || [[word:fathothosoj|fathothosoj]] || [[word:fathothososh|fathothososh]] || [[word:fathothoso|fathothoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fathosoth|fathosoth]] || [[word:fathosoj|fathosoj]] || [[word:fathososh|fathososh]] || [[word:fathoso|fathoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fathofsoth|fathofsoth]] || [[word:fathofsoj|fathofsoj]] || [[word:fathofsosh|fathofsosh]] || [[word:fathofsof|fathofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fathosotho|fathosotho]] || [[word:fathosojo|fathosojo]] || [[word:fathososho|fathososho]] || [[word:fathosoko|fathosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fathosoth|fathosoth]] || [[word:fathosoj|fathosoj]] || [[word:fathososh|fathososh]] || [[word:fathoso|fathoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fathosothol|fathosothol]] || [[word:fathosojol|fathosojol]] || [[word:fathososhol|fathososhol]] || [[word:fathosokol|fathosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fathosothotho|fathosothotho]] || [[word:fathosojojo|fathosojojo]] || [[word:fathososhosho|fathososhosho]] || [[word:fathosoko|fathosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fathosothon|fathosothon]] || [[word:fathosojon|fathosojon]] || [[word:fathososhon|fathososhon]] || [[word:fathosokon|fathosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fathosothoro|fathosothoro]] || [[word:fathosojoro|fathosojoro]] || [[word:fathososhoro|fathososhoro]] || [[word:fathosokoro|fathosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
